scenario: A runtime-only deployment fails to emit the `Link: rel="act"` header on an authenticated response
rejected_because: Runtime-only deployments MUST emit the Link header on every authenticated response so non-HTML clients can discover the well-known ACT manifest. Omitting it leaves agents with no discovery hand-off (cite gap A5).

observed_response.note: Authenticated branch returned a non-ACT JSON payload but did not advertise the runtime ACT manifest. Validator MUST flag per PRD-106-R23.
